The '''''Warhog''''' was a [[VGK-3 Shooting Star class starfighter]] prototype that was stolen by [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance]] [[Infiltrators/Legends|Infiltrator]] [[Bryce Agoris]] and freelance [[operative]] [[Myrgaanti Shi-Iki]].

{{Ship-stub}}
